flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Tom P. Haney Technical College are 22% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($28.3k vs $36.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tom P. Haney Technical College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (68.9% → 45.6%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tom P. Haney Technical College fell 100% between 2017 and 2020 (27.7% → 0.0%).
